TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Sakur ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Karing Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 616 buwan, 1,699 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 39% kyan ku 658 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 61% kyan ku 1,041 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 25%, Sakizaya 8%, Bunun 1%, Tayan 1%, Truku 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sakur hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Sakur hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Sakur hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sakur hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Sakur hya' ga Takubuwan. tay 'llaw na Sakur hya' ga Singsiya. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕakur ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu kariŋ s~ɕi, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, s~ɕakizaja *%, βunun *%, tajan *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕakur ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕakur ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕakur ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕakur ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕakur ħjaʔ ɣa takuβuwan. taj ʔllaw na s~ɕakur ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕiŋs~ɕija. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Sakur ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Karing Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 616 buwan, 1,699 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 39% kyan ku 658 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 61% kyan ku 1,041 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 25%, Sakizaya 8%, Bunun 1%, Tayan 1%, Truku 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sakur hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Sakur hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Sakur hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sakur hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Sakur hya' ga Takubuwan. tay 'llaw na Sakur hya' ga Singsiya. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕakur ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu kariŋ s~ɕi, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, s~ɕakizaja *%, βunun *%, tajan *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕakur ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕakur ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕakur ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕakur ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕakur ħjaʔ ɣa takuβuwan. taj ʔllaw na s~ɕakur ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕiŋs~ɕija. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
